ogTitle: Hazledean vs Headington Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hazledean and Headington Hill.
heading: Hazledean vs Headington Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hazledean, Queensland and Headington Hill, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hazledean has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Headington Hill (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hazledean or Headington Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hazledean has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Headington Hill scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hazledean scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Headington Hill scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hazledean or Headington Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hazledean has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
